title: Anniversary Statement: Rans S6-ESD XL, G-MZBU
body: "This statement provides an update on the ongoing AAIB investigation into an accident involving a Rans S6-ESB which departed the runway during landing, overturned and suffered substantial damage at Yatesbruy airfield, Wiltshire.  The draft report has been produced and consultation comments received.  The final report will be published in the near future. "
